text:
There once was a little girl named Olive who loved to collect seashells. On a moonlit night, she wandered along the sandy beach, her eyes glittering with excitement only the finest shells could inspire. Each one was unique, painted with colors that seemed to pulse with the ocean's heartbeat.

After collecting dozens of beautiful shells, she decided to build a tiny seaside cottage just for them. She carefully polished each shell until it shone like a polished gem. Everything was perfect until Olive noticed something strange. Each morning, one more shell seemed smaller than the last.

One evening, Olive gathered all her precious shells. She pondered what had happened and then remembered a legend about a beach where all the shells once shone brightly, but one unlucky shell had a dim glow. Olive decided to give that shell a home beside her cottage.

The next dawn, the dimly illuminated shell belonged to none other than Ollie's unexpected new friend, a humble lamprey fish. The lamprey had
